MASTER CALENDAR MOTION CALENDAR ON SEP-29-2020 IN DEPT. 206, PLAINTIFFS' MOTION FOR PREFERENTIAL TRIAL SETTING. DEENA ZACHARIN, ESQ. APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFFS VIA COURTCALL. MARK LIPTON, ESQ. APPERING FOR DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VIA COURTCALL. THE COURT GRANTS PLAINTIFFS' MOTION FOR PREFERENCE PURSUANT TO C.C.P. SECTION 36(A). THE TRIAL DATE IS JAN-19-2021 AT 9:30AM IN DEPT. 206 WITH A LAST DAY OF JAN. 27, 2021. LAST DAY FOR HEARING SUMMARY JUDGMENT / ADJUDICATION MOTIONS IS 1/14/21. SUMMARY JUDGMENT / ADJUDICATION MOTIONS SHALL BE BROUGHT ON REGULAR NOTICE PURSUANT TO THE RELEVANT PROVISIONS OF THE CCP, UNLESS THE PARTIES STIPULATE OTHERWISE. TIME TO RESPOND TO DISCOVERY NOT YET SERVED IS SHORTENED TO 20 DAYS. RESPONSES TO WRITTEN DISCOVERY ALREADY SERVED ARE DUE 20 DAYS FROM THE 9/29/20 HEARING OR BY THE DATE DETERMINED BY THE CCP, WHICHEVER IS EARLIER. FACT DISCOVERY CUT-OFF DATE IS 1/8/21. EXPERT DISCOVERY CUT-OFF DATE IS 1/15/21. ELECTRONIC SERVICE IS EQUIVALENT TO PERSONAL SERVICE. IF THERE IS ANY KIND OF ISSUE/DISPUTE THAT REQUIRES MEET AND CONFER, SUCH MEET AND CONFER SHALL NOT BE MADE VIA E-MAIL OR LETTER. THE PARTIES SHALL MEET AND CONFER VIA TELEPHONE. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. MISS ZACHARIN TO SERVE THE ORDER. JUDGE: GARRETT L. WONG; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
